title: [Save As] (File Menu)
description:
[Save As] (File Menu)

[Save As] (File Menu)

Save the program file, include file, point file, or force file with a new file name. The original file will be removed from the project but will remain on the hard disk.

To display the original excluded file, select [Project Explorer]-[Show files except project build].

If you use [Save As] on an include file, you must rename the file in each of your #include statements that refer to it.

[Save All] (File Menu)
 : Ctrl+Shift+S

Saves all open files. This menu selection cannot be selected if there is no new file to be saved.
